title: Anath Hiteshi Anath Alya Arya Samaj Ferozepore ka Mahwari Risala
gloss: A monthly magazine of the Arya Samaj Orphanage at Ferozepore dealing with income and expenditure. Volume VI, Nos. 3 and 4, for March and April, 1910.
publisher: Edited by Lala Jagan Nath, Ferozepore, and published by the Secretary, Orphanage, Ferozepore
notes: Orphanage accounts as periodical — philanthropy's public bookkeeping (institution as p36 s112).

title: Anath Hiteshi, Volume VI, No. 3, for May, 1910
gloss: Edited by Lala Jagan Nath Ferozepore, and published by the Secretary, Orphanage, Ferozepore.
notes: Title dash-continuation of serial 6. Issue numbering overlaps serial 6 (No. 3) as printed.

flags.issue: issue number No. 3 duplicates part of serial 6's 'Nos. 3 and 4' — as printed

title: Anath Hiteshi, Volume VI, Nos. 4 and 5, for June and July, 1910
gloss: Edited by Lala Jagan Nath, Ferozepore, and published by the Secretary, Orphanage, Ferozepore.

title: Monthly Circular of the Punjab Hindu Family Mutual Relief Fund, Lahore, Volume XV, No. 1, for April, 1910
publisher: The Secretary of the Fund named
notes: Urdu edition of the fund circular (Hindi and Punjabi editions at p54): Urdu 5,000–8,000 copies vs Hindi 800–900 and Punjabi 900–1,100 — script-market hierarchy in one document.

publisher: The Secretary of the Fund named

publisher: The Secretary of the Fund named

title: Vedic Philosophy, Volume I, No. 8
gloss: A monthly magazine containing translation of Brahm Sutras, Upanishadas, etc., edited by Swami Darshananda.
notes: Swami Darshanand's Vedic Philosophy monthly (same translator as Mundak Opnishad, p52 s2).
marks: X; pencil '115' right margin; cursive pencil note left margin reading approximately 'with previous nos received'
